# keruyun-sdk-python

> Python SDK for the Keruyun (客如云) restaurant POS open platform API

## Overview

Unofficial Python SDK wrapping the Keruyun Open Platform REST API. Provides typed access to 17 endpoints across 4 modules: report (revenue/sales analytics), shop (store management), order (order queries), and supply chain (inventory/BOM/procurement).

## Installation

pip install keruyun-sdk

## Quick Start

```python
from keruyun import KeruyunClient

client = KeruyunClient(app_key="your_key", app_secret="your_secret")
result = client.report.get_daily_flow(brand_id=123, date="2026-03-15")
```

## API Modules

- report: get_daily_flow, get_shop_flow, get_menu_sales, get_payment_stats, get_business_income
- shop: get_shop_list, get_shop_detail
- order: get_order_list, get_order_detail
- supply: get_inventory, get_bom_list, get_procurement_prediction, and 5 more

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/Horacehxw/keruyun-sdk-python
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/keruyun-sdk/
- Keruyun API docs: https://open.keruyun.com/docs/
